name: Ackee Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ackees with the liquid from the can in a saucepan.
2. Add the chicken stock, tomatoes, shallots, salt, and pepper; cover and simmer gently until the shallots are tender.
3. Puree the mixture in an electric blender.
4. Return to the saucepan, season to taste with Tabasco hot sauce, stir in cream, and heat through.
5. Serve hot or chilled, garnished with chopped chives, flat-leaf parsley, or sweet paprika if desired.
